unresolvedTextByHash.002458b6f67b99c4775723a5315804b722787072: We need [?] bars of iron in the next [?] minutes.
unresolvedTextByHash.01a485c29ddfd38d6ab5c2efce47f93eac0c3289: I'm sorry to hear that, [?], the company really needed those bars.
unresolvedTextByHash.097bfa7dd0d346a604e66a84da89a8894c857304: Come in, [?], my secretary has been saying good things about you.
unresolvedTextByHash.1df03be562ee4015faf1d7a1aeb7a539d4f593b0: It is agreed then! You are now a 'trusted associate' of the [?]. Welcome!
unresolvedTextByHash.35a508fce767295a274570e517c6ce074f545fd7: We need [?] bars of bronze in the next [?] minutes.
unresolvedTextByHash.38e700abea200ed43fc0309fb3d1873ba52bd220: Come, [?], let us converse a while on your future with us.
unresolvedTextByHash.49cca605aa2c6f8c63068caebfd9ed994ae8964f: Almost as much an honour as it is to meet you again, [?]!
unresolvedTextByHash.4e320ba26630047c74e1a3227c0a3f892b682d23: What have you come to ask of us, honourable [?]?
unresolvedTextByHash.56a884c161f5eb2b1b680474eccbfefd01ab3ee2: [?]! I've been hearing great things about you!
unresolvedTextByHash.56cf90417838bcff12c4e3009c39305df435cac7: My secretary will deal with any inquiries you have about the [?].
unresolvedTextByHash.59393344c63295a1b71bf7e6eb4fdcf649086c29: Have you come to serve the [?] again, [?]?
unresolvedTextByHash.5a1706272b4b41d4879ef2f2b0ff7c455cd08af4: I'm always happy to make time for you, [?]!
unresolvedTextByHash.6ae2bdc266af3d5a49d612a5ff4a970f1a9af95a: We need [?] bars of steel in the next [?] minutes.
unresolvedTextByHash.6ca8f7d8141a5a48bc96389d588c5e047bb07614: Welcome back [?], it's great to see you again!
unresolvedTextByHash.75244b11371dce377f1b5cc9eeb77e6cc4e37502: Then hurry back, [?], I'm counting on you!
unresolvedTextByHash.76c9083ce8368c1e0aca9264295988364bbf8a41: So no, I cannot grant you this request yet, but I will certainly keep it in mind. In the mean time make sure you help out the [?] in any way you can.
unresolvedTextByHash.7cb3c7d3d37dffc72e4a839fa4ef41a006e00edc: That is an unusual thing to say for you, [?].
unresolvedTextByHash.83a78e6b243a2f182fbeaf8144f1a9ce22e16f04: I'm not altogether sure... much appreciated though you are, you are not really part of the [?]. Not as such.
unresolvedTextByHash.8b5f004d7931c27fdaee6f5a2fdf51145c7a3650: The [?] can always rely on you, [?].
unresolvedTextByHash.8f2ee1dc7bb3c405c0059a66674b912623ee19c0: You are an exceptional member of the [?].
unresolvedTextByHash.904b5a0a7d1360160d1edca466ba5a836979897c: The [?] is pleased to see you again!
unresolvedTextByHash.99d2d4981cf88b1d60047131ae9200cdce320195: I am well pleased with your work, [?]!
unresolvedTextByHash.9c208180e2124580989cc1424c024581d5e3de9d: We need [?] bars of gold in the next [?] minutes.
unresolvedTextByHash.a50cb70ce39b3aedca613a67af9098e2c39b5747: Hmm, interesting, a human joining the [?].
unresolvedTextByHash.ac2bac2ae71974390bac1117aeb75377934ac0c4: Forthwith, [?], forthwith! I'll order the removal at once!
unresolvedTextByHash.b465bc87d342ec8c21f40f896ca3f797d384350c: You are a true asset to the [?]!
unresolvedTextByHash.cc87e1dd97a9f71a5440d8f194aefc529d750231: You are proving yourself a loyal member of the [?], [?]!
unresolvedTextByHash.ce489cde0b45e5aa71744c3f87b62ff5389c03b6: We need [?] bars of silver in the next [?] minutes.
unresolvedTextByHash.ce643d0dfd5d70caf990b34be1a4fd96ba77b3aa: Hello [?]! Have you seen the statue? It looks beautiful! It's a pity it's been overshadowed by the departure of the Red Axe.
unresolvedTextByHash.cec4a4740effc5d5a6da28f86f44a9d5633b519c: Were what? A part of the [?]?
unresolvedTextByHash.d512cb07c4a75d1c287e88b422e4553ed51c8a2e: And I'm honoured to make some time for you, [?]!
unresolvedTextByHash.e0a77a7ba3abad5572cafa1ea529c26d614b2086: We need [?] bars of mithril in the next [?] minutes.
unresolvedTextByHash.e5bd75e6266df797cf71f9c61aadb427063f3ddf: Have you ever considered joining the [?], [?]? You would truly make a marvelous member.
